/bin/zsh -lc "for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do printf 'health '; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' --max-time 3 http://localhost:8084/healthz; printf 'order  '; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' --max-time 3 http://localhost:8084/order; sleep 1; done"
